nameForms.fullText: Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden

popularStory.headline: Sir.  William Lovelace IV
popularStory.description:
From Bethersden, Kent, knighted in July 1599.
Sir William LOVELACE was born about 1561. 
He was baptized on 30 Sep 1561 in St. Alphege, Canterbury, England. 
He died in 1629 in Canterbury, England. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden於1561年9月30日出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，他的父親William Lovelace III36歲，母親Anne Lewis31歲。他於1581年與Elizabeth Aucher在英國英格蘭肯特貝黑斯達結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1599年登記服兵役。他於1614年在英國被列為member of house of commons, representing canterbury。他去世於1629年10月12日在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特貝黑斯達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden于1561年9月30日出生在英国英格兰肯特时，他的父亲William Lovelace III36岁，母亲Anne Lewis31岁。他于1581年与Elizabeth Aucher在英国英格兰肯特貝黑斯達结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1599年登记服兵役。他于1614年在英国被列为member of house of commons, representing canterbury。他去世于1629年10月12日在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特貝黑斯達。

nameMeanings.name: Lovelace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Loveless  . The spelling is apparently theresult of folk etymology, which understood the word as a nickname fora dandy fond of lace. The modern sense of this word is, however, notattested until the 16th century and at the time of surname formationit meant only ‘cord’ or ‘shoelace’.

variants.name: Loveless
meanings: nickname from Middle English loveles ‘loveless, without love’, probably in the sense ‘fancy free’.
some early examples, such as Richard Lovelas (Kent 1344), may have as their second element Middle English las(se) ‘girl’, ‘maiden’.

nameMeanings.name: IV,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written អ៊ីវ, unexplained. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number IV (meaning ‘the fourth’ of the four bearers of the name) may also be counted as a surname Iv.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

The Union of Utrecht brought together seven northern, Protestant provinces of the Netherlands against the Catholics. Known as the United Provinces, they become the foundation of the Dutch Republic. The Treaty of Utrecht was signed, marking the beginning of the Dutch Republic.
The Dutch declared their independence from Spain.
Britain waged wars against the Dutch.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden was born on 30 September 1561, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Lovelace III, was 36 and his mother, Anne Lewis, was 31. He married Elizabeth Aucher in 1581, in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1599. In 1614, at the age of 53, his occupation is listed as member of house of commons, representing canterbury in England. He died on 12 October 1629, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden est né le 30 septembre 1561, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Lovelace III, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anne Lewis, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Aucher en 1581, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1599. En 1614, à l’âge de 53 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of house of commons, representing canterbury à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1629, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden am 30. September 1561 in Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Lovelace III 36 und seine Mutter Anne Lewis 31. Er hat 1581 in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Aucher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1599 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1614, als er 53 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of house of commons, representing canterbury in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1629 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden è nato il il 30 settembre 1561 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Lovelace III, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Anne Lewis, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Aucher nel 1581, nel Bethersden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1599. Nel 1614, all'età di 53 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of house of commons, representing canterbury nel England. Morì il 12 ottobre 1629, nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Bethersden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersdenが1561年9月30日にイギリスイギリスケントで生まれた時，父William Lovelace IIIは36歳，母Anne Lewisは31歳であった。1581年にイギリスイギリスケントベスエルスデンでElizabeth Aucherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1599年に兵役登録をした。1614年，53歳の時，イギリスでの職業はmember of house of commons, representing canterburyと記録されている。彼は1629年10月12日にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントベスエルスデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden(이)가 1561년 9월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Lovelace III(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Lewis(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1581년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베더즈든에서 Elizabeth Aucher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1599년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1614년, 53세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 member of house of commons, representing canterbury이었다. 그는 1629년 10월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베더즈든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden nasceu em 30 de setembro de 1561, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Lovelace III, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Anne Lewis, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Aucher em 1581, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1599. Em 1614, com 53 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of house of commons, representing canterbury em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1629, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

кантирбури ст алфедж, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden родился 30 сентября 1561 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Lovelace III было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Lewis, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Aucher в 1581 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1599 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1614 году, в возрасте 53 лет, работал по профессии member of house of commons, representing canterbury в местности Англия. Он умер 12 октября 1629 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden nació el 30 de septiembre de 1561, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Lovelace III, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Anne Lewis, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Aucher en 1581, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1599. En 1614, a la edad de 53 años, su ocupación registrada era member of house of commons, representing canterbury en Inglaterra. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1629, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
